```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement database stored procedures and functions"
---
# Stored Procedures
## Task
Implement stored procedures for complex database operations.
## Requirements
1. Define procedures with clear input/output parameters. 2. Use transactions within procedures.
3. Handle errors with TRY/CATCH. 4. Log procedure execution.
5. Version control procedure code.
## Constraints
- Keep business logic in application layer. Procedures for data-intensive operations only.
## Success Criteria
- Procedures handle complex data operations. Error handling works. Code versioned.
```
